name: two-pass reconciler first pass narrows the candidate rule list to top-K by cosine similarity before invoking the subagent
command: mkdir -p rules && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do printf '{"id":"r%d","embedding":[0.%d,0.%d]}\n' "$i" "$i" "$i" > rules/r${i}.json; done && printf '{"id":"new","embedding":[0.5,0.5]}\n' > pattern.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/reconcile.sh" --pattern pattern.json --rules-dir rules --shortlist-k 3 --dry-run --emit shortlist 2>out.txt && grep -q 'shortlist_size=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
